payload.content:
# 配置系统参考手册

> 生成或修改 `config.schema.json` 时，必须参考本文件。

## 基本结构

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "type": "object",
  "$demo": {
    "previewSize": { "width": 375, "height": 812 }
  },
  "properties": {
    "字段名": { "type": "string", "title": "显示名", "default": "默认值" }
  },
  "required": ["必填字段名"]
}
```

## 控件映射规则（三层优先级）

生成 schema 字段时，按以下优先级选择控件：

1. **`ui:widget` 显式覆盖**（最高优先级）— 强制指定控件类型
2. **`format` 语义映射** — 根据值的语义自动匹配控件
3. **`type` 数据类型回退**（最低优先级）— 根据基本类型推断

**原则**：优先使用 `format`（标准语义声明），只在 `format` 无法满足时才用 `ui:widget` 覆盖。

## 可用控件速查表

### 基础类型（Layer 3: type 回退）

| type                 | 控件       | 说明                            |
| -------------------- | ---------- | ------------------------------- |
| `string`             | 文本输入框 | 最基础的文本输入                |
| `number` / `integer` | 数字滑块   | 支持 `minimum`、`maximum` 约束  |
| `boolean`            | 开关       | 真/假切换                       |
| `string` + `enum`    | 下拉选择器 | 配合 `enumNames` 提供中文选项名 |
| `array`              | 多图列表   | 默认渲染为图片列表编辑器        |

### 语义映射（Layer 2: format）

| format    | 控件       | 用法                              |
| --------- | ---------- | --------------------------------- |
| `"color"` | 颜色选择器 | 可视化选色 + 手动输入 HEX 值      |
| `"image"` | 图片上传   | 单图上传，支持 URL 输入和文件上传 |

### 显式覆盖（Layer 1: ui:widget）

| ui:widget     | 控件         | 何时使用                                           |
| ------------- | ------------ | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `"file"`      | 文件上传     | 等同于 `format: "image"`，旧写法                   |
| `"image"`     | 图片上传     | 等同于 `format: "image"`                           |
| `"imageList"` | 多图列表     | `type: "array"` 时使用，支持 `ui:options.maxItems` |
| `"richtext"`  | 富文本编辑器 | 需要格式化文本（HTML 输出）时                      |

### ui:options 配置项

| 选项          | 适用控件      | 说明                                      |
| ------------- | ------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `accept`      | 文件/图片上传 | 限制文件类型，如 `"image/*"`              |
| `maxSize`     | 文件/图片上传 | 最大文件大小（字节），如 `5242880`（5MB） |
| `placeholder` | 文本/文件上传 | 占位提示文案                              |
| `maxItems`    | 多图列表      | 最大图片数量，默认 20                     |

### 图片尺寸校验（ui:options）

当图片配置项需要特定尺寸时，可在 `ui:options` 中声明尺寸约束。系统会在上传时自动校验，尺寸不符会弹出警告对话框，用户可选择「取消上传」或「继续上传」。

| 选项        | 类型     | 说明           | 示例   |
| :---------- | :------- | :------------- | :----- |
| `minWidth`  | `number` | 最小宽度（px） | `100`  |
| `minHeight` | `number` | 最小高度（px） | `100`  |
| `maxWidth`  | `number` | 最大宽度（px） | `2048` |
| `maxHeight` | `number` | 最大高度（px） | `2048` |

**使用原则**：

- 仅在**业务确实需要特定尺寸**时才添加尺寸校验，不要滥用
- 常见的需要尺寸校验场景：Banner 图、头像、商品主图、背景图等
- 建议同时设置 `minWidth` + `minHeight`（保证最小清晰度）或 `maxWidth` + `maxHeight`（控制文件大小）
- 尺寸校验是**警告模式**，不强制阻止上传

**单图示例**（Banner 图，要求宽度至少 750px）：

```json
{
  "bannerImage": {
    "type": "string",
    "format": "image",
    "title": "Banner 图",
    "ui:options": {
      "accept": "image/*",
      "maxSize": 5242880,
      "minWidth": 750,
      "maxWidth": 2048,
      "maxHeight": 1024
    }
  }
}
```

**多图示例**（商品图片，要求正方形且至少 200x200px）：

```json
{
  "productImages": {
    "type": "array",
    "title": "商品图片",
    "ui:widget": "imageList",
    "ui:options": {
      "maxItems": 10,
      "minWidth": 200,
      "minHeight": 200
    }
  }
}
```

## 扩展字段（$demo）

### $demo.previewSize — 预览尺寸

控制预览区的渲染尺寸（放在 schema 根级别）：

```json
{
  "$demo": {
    "previewSize": { "width": 375, "height": 812 }
  }
}
```

常用尺寸：手机竖屏 `375×812`、平板横屏 `1024×768`、桌面 `1440×900`。

### $demo.orderable — 组件排序

声明哪些子组件支持用户拖拽排序（放在 schema 根级别）：

```json
{
  "$demo": {
    "orderable": ["header", "banner", "content", "footer"]
  },
  "properties": {
    "header": { "type": "object", "title": "头部区域", "properties": {...} },
    "banner": { "type": "object", "title": "横幅区域", "properties": {...} },
    "content": { "type": "object", "title": "内容区域", "properties": {...} },
    "footer": { "type": "object", "title": "底部区域", "properties": {...} }
 
...[truncated]

parameters.content:
# 项目记忆

> AI 自动维护 · 最后更新：2025-01-01

## 我的偏好

- 使用明亮的足球主题色彩，儿童友好风格
- 绿色、金色、蓝色为主色调

## 关键决策

- 首页为任务聚合页，展示三大任务入口 —— 用户可在首页概览所有任务
- 每日助威、扭蛋抽奖、活动规则、结算页独立为单独页面 —— 功能模块清晰分离

parameters.content:
interface DemoProps { title: string; brandColor: string; championTeam: string; championFlag: string; userTeam: string; cheeredTeamWon: boolean; totalCheerDays: number; totalDraws: number; lessonsCompleted: number; lessonsTotal: number; skinUnlocked: boolean; earnedPrizes: { name: string; icon: string }[]; summaryText: string; } import { Trophy, Medal, Star, CheckCircle, XCircle, Sparkles } from "lucide-react"; export default function Demo({ title = "🏆 活动结算", brandColor = "#22C55E", championTeam = "巴西队", championFlag = "🇧🇷", userTeam = "巴西队", cheeredTeamWon = true, totalCheerDays = 45, totalDraws = 38, lessonsCompleted = 10, lessonsTotal = 10, skinUnlocked = true, earnedPrizes = [ { name: "足球徽章", icon: "🏅" }, { name: "球星贴纸", icon: "⭐" }, { name: "限量手环", icon: "🎗️" }, { name: "世界杯徽章", icon: "🏆" }, ], summaryText = "感谢你参与本次儿童世界杯助威活动！你的热情为世界杯增添了无限精彩。", }: DemoProps) { const lessonProgress = Math.round((lessonsCompleted / lessonsTotal) * 100); return (
{/* Hero Section */}

{title}

活动已圆满结束

{/* Champion Announcement */}

🏆 本届世界杯冠军

{championFlag}

{championTeam}

{/* User Stats */}

我的活动数据

{totalCheerDays}

累计助威天数

{totalDraws}

累计抽奖次数

{/* Lesson Progress */}
📚 学习任务 {lessonsCompleted}/{lessonsTotal} 节课

parameters.schema: {"$schema":"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema","type":"object","$demo":{"previewSize":{"width":375,"height":812}},"properties":{"headerImage":{"type":"string","format":"image","title":"头图","default":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579952363873-27f3bade9f55?w=750&h=400&fit=crop","ui:options":{"accept":"image/*","maxSize":5242880,"minWidth":750,"maxHeight":600}},"title":{"type":"string","title":"活动标题","default":"🏆 儿童世界杯助威活动"},"subtitle":{"type":"string","title":"副标题","default":"为热爱加油，为梦想助威！"},"brandColor":{"type":"string","format":"color","title":"品牌主色","default":"#22C55E"},"task1Title":{"type":"string","title":"任务1标题","default":"⚽ 每日助威"},"task1Desc":{"type":"string","title":"任务1描述","default":"选择你喜欢的球队，每日助威一次，赢取抽奖机会！"},"task2Title":{"type":"string","title":"任务2标题","default":"🎰 扭蛋抽奖"},"task2Desc":{"type":"string","title":"任务2描述","default":"助威获得抽奖机会，转动扭蛋机赢取精美奖品！"},"task3Title":{"type":"string","title":"任务3标题","default":"📚 学习任务"},"task3Desc":{"type":"string","title":"任务3描述","default":"完成10节课，助威球队夺冠即可获得冠军皮肤！"},"cheerTitle":{"type":"string","title":"热门球队标题","default":"🔥 热门助威球队"},"topTeamName":{"type":"string","title":"热门球队名称","default":"巴西队"},"topTeamFlag":{"type":"string","title":"热门球队旗帜","default":"🇧🇷"},"cheerCount":{"type":"number","title":"助威人数","default":12580,"minimum":0}},"required":["headerImage","title","brandColor"]}

{"$schema":"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema","type":"object","$demo":{"previewSize":{"width":375,"height":812}},"properties":{"title":{"type":"string","title":"页面标题","default":"⚽ 每日助威"},"brandColor":{"type":"string","format":"color","title":"品牌主色","default":"#22C55E"},"hasCheeredToday":{"type":"boolean","title":"今日已助威","default":false},"cheerCount":{"type":"number","title":"今日助威总人数","default":36890,"minimum":0},"teamList":{"type":"array","title":"球队列表","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","title":"球队名称"},"flag":{"type":"string","title":"国旗表情"},"emoji":{"type":"string","title":"球队颜色表情"}}},"default":[{"name":"巴西队","flag":"🇧🇷","emoji":"🟡"},{"name":"阿根廷","flag":"🇦🇷","emoji":"🔵"},{"name":"德国队","flag":"🇩🇪","emoji":"⚫"},{"name":"法国队","flag":"🇫🇷","emoji":"🔵"},{"name":"英格兰","flag":"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿","emoji":"🔴"},{"name":"西班牙","flag":"🇪🇸","emoji":"🔴"},{"name":"葡萄牙","flag":"🇵🇹","emoji":"🟢"},{"name":"荷兰队","flag":"🇳🇱","emoji":"🟠"}]},"selectedTeamIndex":{"type":"number","title":"默认选中球队索引","default":0,"minimum":0},"cheerButtonText":{"type":"string","title":"助威按钮文案","default":"🎉 助威！"},"cheeredText":{"type":"string","title":"已助威提示文案","default":"✅ 今日已助威"}},"required":["title","brandColor"]}

{"$schema":"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema","type":"object","$demo":{"previewSize":{"width":375,"height":812}},"properties":{"title":{"type":"string","title":"页面标题","default":"🎰 扭蛋抽奖"},"brandColor":{"type":"string","format":"color","title":"品牌主色","default":"#F59E0B"},"remainingChances":{"type":"number","title":"剩余抽奖次数","default":1,"minimum":0},"totalChances":{"type":"number","title":"总抽奖次数","default":10,"minimum":0},"capsuleColor":{"type":"string","format":"color","title":"扭蛋颜色","default":"#EF4444"},"spinText":{"type":"string","title":"转动按钮文案","default":"🎯 转动扭蛋"},"noChanceText":{"type":"string","title":"无机会提示","default":"💤 没有抽奖机会了"},"prizeList":{"type":"array","title":"奖品列表","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","title":"奖品名称"},"icon":{"type":"string","title":"奖品图标"},"color":{"type":"string","title":"背景颜色类"},"rarity":{"type":"string","title":"稀有度","enum":["普通","稀有","史诗","传说"],"enumNames":["普通","稀有","史诗","传说"]}}},"default":[{"name":"足球徽章","icon":"🏅","color":"bg-yellow-100 border-yellow-300","rarity":"普通"},{"name":"球星贴纸","icon":"⭐","color":"bg-blue-100 border-blue-300","rarity":"普通"},{"name":"限量手环","icon":"🎗️","color":"bg-green-100 border-green-300","rarity":"稀有"},{"name":"冠军皮肤","icon":"👑","color":"bg-purple-100 border-purple-300","rarity":"传说"},{"name":"世界杯徽章","icon":"🏆","color":"bg-amber-100 border-amber-300","rarity":"史诗"},{"name":"球队围巾","icon":"🧣","color":"bg-red-100 border-red-300","rarity":"稀有"}]},"wonPrize":{"type":"string","title":"中奖奖品名称","default":"🏅 足球徽章"},"showResult":{"type":"boolean","title":"显示抽奖结果","default":false}},"required":["title","brandColor"]}

{"$schema":"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema","type":"object","$demo":{"previewSize":{"width":375,"height":812}},"properties":{"title":{"type":"string","title":"页面标题","default":"📋 活动规则"},"brandColor":{"type":"string","format":"color","title":"品牌主色","default":"#22C55E"},"eventName":{"type":"string","title":"活动名称","default":"儿童世界杯助威活动"},"eventPeriod":{"type":"string","title":"活动时间","default":"2025年6月1日 - 2025年7月31日"},"organizer":{"type":"string","title":"主办方","default":"儿童体育成长中心"},"rulesList":{"type":"array","title":"规则列表","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"title":{"type":"string","title":"规则标题"},"content":{"type":"string","title":"规则内容"}}},"default":[{"title":"一、每日助威规则","content":"每位用户每天可为自己喜欢的球队助威1次。助威后即可获得1次扭蛋抽奖机会。次日00:00刷新助威次数。助威球队可在当天内随时更换。"},{"title":"二、扭蛋抽奖规则","content":"每次助威获得1次扭蛋抽奖机会。抽奖机会当日有效，过期作废。扭蛋奖品包含足球徽章、球星贴纸、限量手环、世界杯徽章、冠军皮肤等。不同奖品稀有度不同，获取概率请参见奖品概率公示。"},{"title":"三、学习任务规则","content":"活动期间，用户需完成10节足球主题课程。每完成1节课，进度+10%。完成全部10节课后，若用户助威的球队最终获得世界杯冠军，即可解锁「冠军皮肤」奖励。"},{"title":"四、冠军皮肤获取条件","content":"1. 活动期间完成10节课程（100%进度）
2. 用户助威的球队最终赢得世界杯冠军
3. 两项条件同时满足后，系统自动发放冠军皮肤
4. 冠军皮肤为永久限定皮肤，发放后将存入用户账户"},{"title":"五、其他说明","content":"活动最终解释权归主办方所有。如有违规刷取行为，主办方有权取消参与资格。奖品将在活动结束后7个工作日内发放。如有疑问请联系客服。"}]},"disclaimer":{"type":"string","title":"免责声明","default":"* 本活动最终解释权归儿童体育成长中心所有"}},"required":["title","eventName"]}

{"$schema":"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema","type":"object","$demo":{"previewSize":{"width":375,"height":812}},"properties":{"title":{"type":"string","title":"页面标题","default":"🏆 活动结算"},"brandColor":{"type":"string","format":"color","title":"品牌主色","default":"#22C55E"},"championTeam":{"type":"string","title":"冠军球队名称","default":"巴西队"},"championFlag":{"type":"string","title":"冠军球队国旗","default":"🇧🇷"},"userTeam":{"type":"string","title":"用户助威球队","default":"巴西队"},"cheeredTeamWon":{"type":"boolean","title":"助威球队是否夺冠","default":true},"totalCheerDays":{"type":"number","title":"累计助威天数","default":45,"minimum":0},"totalDraws":{"type":"number","title":"累计抽奖次数","default":38,"minimum":0},"lessonsCompleted":{"type":"number","title":"已完成课程数","default":10,"minimum":0,"maximum":10},"lessonsTotal":{"type":"number","title":"课程总数","default":10,"minimum":1},"skinUnlocked":{"type":"boolean","title":"是否解锁冠军皮肤","default":true},"earnedPrizes":{"type":"array","title":"已获得奖品","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","title":"奖品名称"},"icon":{"type":"string","title":"奖品图标"}}},"default":[{"name":"足球徽章","icon":"🏅"},{"name":"球星贴纸","icon":"⭐"},{"name":"限量手环","icon":"🎗️"},{"name":"世界杯徽章","icon":"🏆"}]},"summaryText":{"type":"string","title":"总结文案","default":"感谢你参与本次儿童世界杯助威活动！你的热情为世界杯增添了无限精彩。"}},"required":["title","brandColor","championTeam"]}

title: Tool call finished
summary:
# 项目记忆

> AI 自动维护 · 最后更新：2025-01-01

## 我的偏好

- 使用明亮的足球主题色彩，儿童友好风格
- 绿色、金色、蓝色为主色调

## 关键决策

- 首页为任务聚合页，展示三大任务入口 —— 用户可在首页概览所有任务
- 每日助威、扭蛋抽奖、活动规则、结算页独立为单独页面 —— 功能模块清晰分离

# 项目记忆

> AI 自动维护 · 最后更新：2025-01-01
